meaning: adj.两栖类的,水陆两用的n.两栖动物,水陆两用飞机,水陆两用的平底车辆
examples: Why does the speaker choose that amphibian as her representative of a public creature?
The world is an amphibian smorgasbord to the Epomis beetles.
At first this amphibian deals with the cooler days by burying itself in the soil.
Our analyses revealed five alpha keratins as main structural proteins of the amphibian toe pad.
Ringwood Amphibian Conservationists runs an annual patrol by volunteers who assist the toads with the crossing.
